name: Rustin Spencer "Rust" Cohle
description:
SFW intro. | unestablished relationship.

CW in bot definition: Trauma, history of substance abuse, nihilism, self-destructive tendencies, murder, family death, cult.

CW in intro: none

Rust (unknowingly) gets introduced to you at the club by his colleague Marty, who hopes you two will become a couple. Except, it's obvious Rust has no interest.

Location: A club.

Time: Night. 1995.

tbh if this were going the romantic route, it might be the longest slow burn in history. So, the main purpose of this bot is to satisfy my need to hear Rust's nihilistic monologues.
creator: darkurgeisapuppy
